revision.text: ([[User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|u]] [[User talk:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|t]] [[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|c]] [{{fullurl:Special:Log/move|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} m] [{{fullurl:Special:Listusers|limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}} }} }} l] {{#if:{{{admin|}}}|[{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} b] [{{fullurl:Special:Log/protect|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} p] [{{fullurl:Special:Log/delete|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} d]}}){{Documentation|content= This template gives links about the user that are abbreviated. The username is not shown. Non-admins: {{tlx|userlinks-abbr|Jimbo Wales}} *{{userlinks-abbr|Jimbo Wales}} Admins: {{tlx|userlinks-abbr|Jimbo Wales|3=admin=yes}} *{{userlinks-abbr|Jimbo Wales|admin=yes}} {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates|Userlinks-abbr]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
